plans.title: Domain Factory Contract And Baseline Context
plans.description: Define project-scoped state, baseline context, protected foundation areas, allowed domain scope, and approval rules.

plans.title: Mobile Entry Point And Chat Mode Activation
plans.description: Add the Domain Factory button, require a current project, configure the current chat, and persist mode state.

plans.title: Domain Intake References And Role Model
plans.description: Collect domain requirements, references, role/permission needs, and domain contract without repeating baseline setup.

plans.title: Generator And Reviewer Domain Prompts
plans.description: Configure paired generator/reviewer prompts for domain implementation on top of the initialized baseline.

plans.title: SDD And Workbench Integration
plans.description: Persist intake, create/update domain SDD artifacts, require diagrams, and surface domain tasks in Workbench.

plans.title: Domain Build Release Pipeline
plans.description: Validate, build, publish, smoke, register, and evidence the next real preview release after domain implementation.

plans.title: Tests Evidence And Operational Guardrails
plans.description: Add regression tests and guardrails for context, UI, prompts, domain roles, SDD, release evidence, and baseline preservation.
